manufacturer.value: Suntory Beverage and Food GB and Ireland (Lucozade Ribena Suntory until 2020)
manufacturer.note: The maker was renamed from Lucozade Ribena Suntory to Suntory Beverage and Food GB and Ireland in September 2020; Open Food Facts still records the legacy name.

ingredientsText.value: Carbonated Water, Glucose Syrup (13%), Acids (Citric Acid, Lactic Acid), Flavourings, Acidity Regulator (Sodium Citrate), Preservative (Potassium Sorbate), Caffeine, Sweeteners (Sucralose, Acesulfame K), Antioxidant (Ascorbic Acid), Colours (Sunset Yellow, Ponceau 4R), Niacin (B3)
ingredientsText.note: Current label as transcribed by Open Food Facts (tertiary); the high-intensity sweeteners sucralose and acesulfame K are a reformulation addition to the glucose-syrup base. A direct manufacturer or retailer label page could not be retrieved (Tesco returned HTTP 403), so this rests on a single tertiary transcription pending an independent re-read.

sugars.note: Open Food Facts records 4.16g sugars per 100g; the marketed GB label figure is below 4.5g per 100ml (a small per-100g versus per-100ml unit difference, not a contradiction).
